-module(solve).
-export([solve/1]).

solve(List) ->
    N = length(List),
    MaxIndex = N - 1,
    Sieve = lists:map(
        fun(I) -> is_prime(I) end,
        lists:seq(0, MaxIndex)
    ),
    SumA = lists:foldl(
        fun(I, Acc) ->
            if Sieve[I] -> Acc + List[I]; true -> Acc end
        end,
        0,
        lists:seq(0, MaxIndex)
    ),
    SumB = lists:foldl(
        fun(I, Acc) ->
            if not Sieve[I] -> Acc + List[I]; true -> Acc end
        end,
        0,
        lists:seq(0, MaxIndex)
    ),
    abs(SumA - SumB).

is_prime(N) when N < 2 -> false;
is_prime(2) -> true;
is_prime(3) -> true;
is_prime(N) ->
    case N rem 2 of
        0 -> false;
        _ ->
            Sqrt = math:sqrt(N),
            FloorSqrt = trunc(Sqrt),
            lists:all(
                fun(I) -> N rem I /= 0 end,
                lists:seq(3, FloorSqrt, 2)
            )
    end.
```

-module(solve).
-compile(export_all).

solve(nums) ->
    N = length(nums),
    MaxIndex = N - 1,
    Sieve = generate_sieve(MaxIndex),
    SumA = lists:foldl(fun(I, Acc) ->
        if
            lists:nth(I + 1, Sieve) == true ->
                Acc + lists:nth(I + 1, nums);
            true ->
                Acc
        end
    end, 0, lists:seq(0, N - 1)),
    SumB = lists:sum([Num || I <- lists:seq(0, N - 1), not (lists:nth(I + 1, Sieve) == true)]),
    abs(SumA - SumB).

generate_sieve(N) when N >= 0 ->
    Initial = [false, false | [true || _ <- lists:seq(2, N)]],
    sieve_helper(2, N, Initial).

sieve_helper(I, N, Sieve) when I * I > N ->
    Sieve;
sieve_helper(I, N, Sieve) ->
    IsPrime = lists:nth(I + 1, Sieve),
    if
        IsPrime ->
            NewSieve = sieve_with_multiples(I, N, Sieve),
            sieve_helper(I + 1, N, NewSieve);
        true ->
            sieve_helper(I + 1, N, Sieve)
    end.

sieve_with_multiples(I, N, Sieve) ->
    [if J >= I * I, J rem I == 0 -> false; true -> lists:nth(J + 1, Sieve) end || J <- lists:seq(0, N)].
